'''pajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:swearingly|swearingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swearingly|swearingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pajate|pajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pajatesher|pajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pajatesherĂ«m|pajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pajatero|pajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pajateshĂ«|pajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pajateshĂ«m|pajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipajatero|gokipajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipajateshĂ«|gokipajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipajateshĂ«m|gokipajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopajankerom|gopajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopajankeshĂ«|gopajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopajankeshĂ«m|gopajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopajankeya|gopajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pajaterom|pajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pajatemu|pajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pajateya|pajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipajaterom|gokipajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipajatemu|gokipajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipajateya|gokipajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pajajate|pajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pajajatesher|pajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pajajatesherĂ«m|pajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pajajatero|pajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pajajateshĂ«|pajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pajajateshĂ«m|pajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipajajatero|gokipajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipajajateshĂ«|gokipajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipajajateshĂ«m|gokipajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopajajankerom|gopajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopajajankeshĂ«|gopajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopajajankeshĂ«m|gopajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopajajankeya|gopajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pajajaterom|pajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pajajatemu|pajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pajajateya|pajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipajajaterom|gokipajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipajajatemu|gokipajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipajajateya|gokipajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠjĂŠte|pĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠjĂŠtesher|pĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠjĂŠtero|pĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠjĂŠtero|gokipĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠjĂŠterom|pĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠjĂŠtemu|pĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠjĂŠteya|pĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠjĂŠterom|gokipĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠjĂŠteya|gokipĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafjafte|pafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafjaftesher|pafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafjaftesherĂ«m|pafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafjaftero|pafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafjafteshĂ«|pafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafjafteshĂ«m|pafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafjaftero|gokipafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafjafteshĂ«|gokipafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafjafteshĂ«m|gokipafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafjafnkerom|gopafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafjafnkeshĂ«|gopafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafjafnkeshĂ«m|gopafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafjafnkeya|gopafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafjafterom|pafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafjaftemu|pafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafjafteya|pafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafjafterom|gokipafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafjaftemu|gokipafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafjafteya|gokipafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
